---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a command, flag, or workflow
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What's the workflow

Describe the actual job-to-be-done. What clicks-through-the-dashboard pain are you replacing?

## What I'd type

```sh
revcat ...
```

What flags / arguments / output should this command have?

## RC API endpoint

Is this a wrapper around an existing v2 endpoint? Link the docs page if you know it: <https://www.revenuecat.com/docs/api-v2>.

If it composes multiple endpoints into one command (verb-orchestrator), describe the steps.

## Anything else

Constraints, relevant existing commands, etc.
